title: eto.memo.coordination_log.v1 payload
description: Payload portion of an eto.memo.coordination_log.v1 envelope. A single A2A task lifecycle event suitable for replay and audit.

task_id.description: Stable identifier for the task across the full lifecycle.

actor.description: Identifier of the agent emitting this event (DID or wallet address).

parent_event.description: Optional reference to a prior event (e.g. signature or memo digest) this event responds to.
